faqs.question: How do I upgrade my plan?
faqs.answer: Settings > Billing > Change Plan. Upgrades take effect immediately with prorated billing.

faqs.question: How do I cancel my subscription?
faqs.answer: Settings > Billing > Cancel Subscription. Access continues until end of billing period.

faqs.question: Can I pause my subscription?
faqs.answer: Subscription pauses not available. Cancel and resubscribe when ready.
